evidence: "I really liked this movie. The movie covers the lives of a defunct group of super heroes..."
"The hero’s don’t just jump up to be super wholesome..."
"The lines between Jedi and regular fighter are blurred..."
"I could watch another solo movie easily..."
"At first the lack of Hollywood polish was off putting..."
"The special effects seem a tad dated..."
"I must say that this movie was surprisingly well done..."
"I remember seeing the first starwars when I was eight..."
"The music for this release was made from the original musical score..."
"The best part was that it really hooked into what a world would be like if law and order broke down..."
"It was refreshing to see the world as a nice place to live..."

summary: The user has a strong preference for adventure and sci-fi genres, particularly enjoying the Star Wars franchise. They appreciate fast-paced narratives with emotional depth and a mix of visual spectacle, while showing some sensitivity to production quality.
